payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: King-size bed with a beige-and-gray striped duvet and two matching pillow shams against a dark stained wooden headboard; bed fills the foreground and the left headboard is partially edge-cropped — camera approximately 1.5 m from the near edge of the bed.
